title: Export Board Data as a E-Invoice

posts.author: anna.calloch (Anna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Everyone,

starting 2025 there is going to be a new european regulation concerning E-Invoicing: an invoice must be in PDF A/3 format , with a set of invoice data presented in an XML structured file conformant to EN16931.

Does anyone has any ideas or maybe a plugin to be able to export the data of a board in that format?

Thanks!
